title: PropEquity is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: PropEquity is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!
